channel.title: Research on Om Arora
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Om Arora

item.title: What the Yang–Mills Mass Gap Problem Actually Asks
item.description: An explanation of what the Yang-Mills mass gap problem actually asks.

item.title: Why I Am Interested in the Yang–Mills Mass Gap Problem
item.description: A reflection on why I am interested in the Yang-Mills mass gap problem.

item.title: Why Research Needs Builder Thinking
item.description: A reflection on why meaningful research requires the mindset of a builder, written as advice to my younger self.

item.title: What Talking to Startup Founders Changed About How I Think About Research
item.description: How exposure to startup founders reshaped my approach to scientific research, risk, and execution.

item.title: Differences Between Olympiad Math and Research Math
item.description: A reflection on the differences between olympiad math and research math, and what each prepares you for.

item.title: Why I’m Writing This Blog
item.description: What this blog is for, who it’s meant to help, and what I plan to write here.
